title: FerrFlow Configuration
description: Configuration file for FerrFlow — universal semantic versioning for monorepos and classic repos.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion.

anonymous_telemetry.description: Send anonymous usage statistics to improve FerrFlow. No identifying data is collected.

versioning.description: Default versioning strategy for all packages.

tagTemplate.description: Tag template. Use {name} for package name and {version} for version. Default: 'v{version}' for single repos, '{name}@v{version}' for monorepos.

recoverMissedReleases.description: Compare files against the last tag instead of just the last commit, recovering missed releases in monorepos.

releaseCommitMode.description: How to commit version bumps and changelog updates. 'commit' pushes directly to the branch, 'pr' creates a pull request, 'none' skips committing entirely.

releaseCommitScope.description: In monorepo mode, whether to create a single grouped commit for all packages or one commit per package. Only affects behavior when multiple packages are bumped.

autoMergeReleases.description: Automatically merge release PRs when releaseCommitMode is 'pr'.

skipCi.description: Append [skip ci] to the release commit message. Defaults to true in 'commit' mode, false in 'pr' mode.

floatingTags.description: Floating tag levels to create/move on each release. Each level produces a tag pointing to the latest matching release (e.g. 'major' creates a v1 tag for v1.2.3).

forge.description: Git forge type. 'auto' detects from the remote URL. Use 'github' or 'gitlab' to override (useful for self-hosted instances with custom domains).

orphanedTagStrategy.description: How to handle tags pointing to orphaned commits (after rebase + force-push). 'warn' logs a warning and skips. 'treeHash' attempts recovery by matching the commit's tree hash. 'message' attempts recovery by matching the commit message.

branches.description: Map branches to pre-release channels. When FerrFlow runs on a branch matching a configured name/pattern, it uses the corresponding channel.

channel.description: false for stable releases, string for pre-release channel name.

prereleaseIdentifier.description: Strategy for the pre-release identifier after the channel name.

package.description: List of packages to version. Use one entry for single repos, multiple for monorepos.

name.description: Package name, used in tags and changelog headers.

path.description: Path to the package root, relative to the repo root. Use "." for single repos.

changelog.description: Path to the changelog file, relative to the repo root.

versionedFiles.description: Files that contain the package version to update on release.

path.description: Path to the version file, relative to the repo root.

format.description: File format used to locate and update the version field.

selector.description: Optional selector to disambiguate which version is bumped. xml: a slash-delimited tag path like '/project/version' (or '//tag' for first-anywhere); txt: a regex with one capture group around the version. Without a selector, xml uses a Maven-aware default (first <version> direct child of root).

sharedPaths.description: Paths whose changes should trigger a version bump for this package (monorepo only).

dependsOn.description: Package names this package depends on. When a dependency is bumped, this package gets a patch bump automatically.

versioning.description: Versioning strategy for this package. Overrides workspace default.

tagTemplate.description: Tag template for this package. Use {name} for package name and {version} for version. Overrides workspace default.

floatingTags.description: Floating tag levels for this package. Overrides workspace default.

hooks.description: Shell commands executed at lifecycle points during release.

preBump.description: Run after bump calculation, before writing version files.

postBump.description: Run after writing version files, before changelog generation.

preCommit.description: Run after changelog generation, before git commit.

prePublish.description: Run after commit and tag, before push.

postPublish.description: Run after push and release creation.

onFailure.description: Behavior when a hook exits non-zero.
